ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "chr" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the gene */,
  "band" TEXT /* Chromosomal band */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol */,
  "isHK" INTEGER /* Is the gene a housekeeping gene */,
  "isTF" INTEGER /* Is the gene a transcription factor */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Gene description */,
  "chromosome_arm" TEXT /* Chromosome arm (e.g., p, q) */,
  "gene_biotype" TEXT /* Gene biotype (e.g., protein_coding, pseudogene) */,
  "external_database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external database where the gene is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ensemblID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES gene_types ("type"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_chr FOREIGN KEY ("chr") REFERENCES chromosomes ("chr"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genes_band FOREIGN KEY ("band") REFERENCES bands ("band")
)

CREATE TABLE "chromosomes" (
  "chr" INTEGER /* Chromosome number */,
  "name" TEXT /* Chromosome name */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the chromosome */,
  "assembly" TEXT /* Genome assembly (e.g., GRCh38, hg19) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chr")
)

CREATE TABLE "bands" (
  "band" TEXT /* Chromosomal band */,
  "name" TEXT /* Band name */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the band */,
  "stain" TEXT /* Stain used to visualize the band (e.g., Giemsa) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("band")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_types" (
  "type" TEXT /* Type of gene (e.g., protein-coding, non-coding) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the gene type (e.g., coding, non-coding) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "ensemblID1" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the first protein */,
  "ensemblID2" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the second protein */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., physical, genetic) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_ensemblID1 FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID1") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_interactions_ensemblID2 FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID2") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expression measurement */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue where the gene is expressed */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type where the gene is expressed */,
  "developmental_stage" TEXT /* Developmental stage where the gene is expressed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_accessed" TEXT /* Resource accessed by the user (e.g., gene, chromosome) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "annotation" TEXT /* Annotation text */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., function, phenotype) */,
  "annotation_source" TEXT /* Source of the annotation (e.g., literature, database) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_annotations_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external database */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the external database */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the external database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the external database */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data stored in the external database (e.g., genomic, transcriptomic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_regulatory_elements" (
  "element_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory element */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "element_type" TEXT /* Type of regulatory element (e.g., promoter, enhancer) */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome where the regulatory element is located */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the regulatory element */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the regulatory element */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("element_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_regulatory_elements_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "genomic_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variant */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "variant_type" TEXT /* Type of variant (e.g., SNP, deletion) */,
  "chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome where the variant is located */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the variant */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference allele */,
  "alternative" TEXT /* Alternative allele */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_genomic_variants_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expression_atlas" (
  "atlas_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each atlas entry */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the gene */,
  "tissue" TEXT /* Tissue where the gene is expressed */,
  "cell_type" TEXT /* Cell type where the gene is expressed */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Expression value of the gene */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("atlas_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expression_atlas_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the protein */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "start" INTEGER /* Start position of the domain */,
  "end" INTEGER /* End position of the domain */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_domains_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protein_family_memberships" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership */,
  "ensemblID" TEXT /* Ensembl ID of the protein */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_family_memberships_ensemblID FOREIGN KEY ("ensemblID") REFERENCES genes ("ensemblID"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_protein_family_memberships_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES protein_families ("family_id")
)
